title: Workspace Manifest v1
description: Schema for workspace-manifest.yaml — declares which organs are present in a partial checkout for collaborator workspaces.

operator.description: Handle of the primary operator of this workspace

items.description: CLI short key for an organ (I, II, III, IV, V, VI, VII, META)

organs_present.description: Which organs are checked out in this workspace

partial.description: Whether this is a partial checkout (true) or full workspace (false)

notes.description: Free-text notes about this workspace configuration
